summary: Verified ADR 0224 from the latest-origin-main integration candidate by proving the validated repository commit through the private Gitea branch gate, publishing that same source tree into the private Gitea main trusted by the host, replaying the server-resident ansible-pull service on proxmox_florin, and re-verifying the ADR 0226 host control-loop timer, path trigger, and manual one-shot service without any controller-side mutate loop.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest pytest -q tests/test_proxmox_host_control_loops_role.py tests/test_server_resident_reconciliation.py` passed with `10 passed in 0.09s`, `make workflow-info WORKFLOW=configure-host-control-loops` returned the governed ADR 0226 workflow contract, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces agent-standards yaml json role-argument-specs ansible-syntax data-models` passed on active validation commit `7b4462fe17c4bcf1bc458a2dea4e261c86104e11`, and the final generated-surface refresh on source commit `8b6db7e83aef863792da7e8cf99a4e59b8286c07` passed both `scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check` and `scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`.

Private Gitea accepted branch head `8b6db7e83aef863792da7e8cf99a4e59b8286c07`; workflow run `56` / run number `52` finished with `status: completed` and `conclusion: success`, and job `70` named `validate` ran on runner `docker-build-lv3` from `2026-03-28T20:14:05Z` through `2026-03-28T20:14:09Z`.

The host-trusted private Gitea `main` fast-forwarded from `5b121f700d0f1cd372ef85f24288691fb8a88e0c` to snapshot `64417a8866bcc103ea3b5815359a6e5027504831` published for source commit `8b6db7e83aef863792da7e8cf99a4e59b8286c07`; the same remote gate passed `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-lint`, `ansible-syntax`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `dependency-direction`, `dependency-graph`, `integration-tests`, `packer-validate`, `schema-validation`, `security-scan`, `service-completeness`, `tofu-validate`, `type-check`, and `yaml-lint`.

On `2026-03-28T20:17:03Z`, `sudo systemctl start lv3-server-resident-reconciliation.service` completed successfully on `proxmox_florin`; `/srv/proxmox_florin_server` checked out `64417a8866bcc103ea3b5815359a6e5027504831`, the working tree stayed clean, and `/var/lib/lv3/server-resident-reconciliation/receipts/latest.json` recorded `status: ok`, `exit_code: 0`, `duration_seconds: 12`, `repo_branch: main`, and `source_commit: 64417a8866bcc103ea3b5815359a6e5027504831`.

`lv3-server-resident-reconciliation.timer` remained `ActiveState=active SubState=waiting` with `LastTriggerUSec=Sat 2026-03-28 21:00:58 CET` and `NextElapseUSecRealtime=Sat 2026-03-28 21:31:27 CET`, while `lv3-server-resident-reconciliation.service` ended `Result=success ExecMainStatus=0 ActiveState=inactive SubState=dead` after the exact-main replay.

verification.check: Path-triggered host control-loop replay after exact-main publication
verification.observed: Writing `ws-0224-path-20260328T201750Z` to `/var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/requests/reconcile.request` was consumed immediately; `latest.json` recorded `trigger: path_request` at `2026-03-28T20:17:51Z` with `history_path: /var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/runs/20260328T201751Z.json`.

verification.check: Manual one-shot host control-loop replay after exact-main publication
verification.observed: `sudo systemctl start lv3-host-control-loop-reconcile.service` immediately after the path-triggered replay recorded `trigger: scheduled_or_manual` at `2026-03-28T20:17:59Z` with `history_path: /var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/runs/20260328T201759Z.json`; the service finished `Result=success ActiveState=inactive SubState=dead`, and both the timer and path units remained `ActiveState=active SubState=waiting`.

notes: ADR 0226 first became true earlier on platform version `0.130.38`; this ADR 0224 receipt records the later exact-main proof that the combined server-resident control model is now true on platform version `0.130.42` and integrated into repository release `0.177.48`.

The exact-main host replay consumed private Gitea snapshot `64417a8866bcc103ea3b5815359a6e5027504831` published from source commit `8b6db7e83aef863792da7e8cf99a4e59b8286c07` because the host trusts the private Gitea repository rather than GitHub directly.

Any same-turn branch edits after the exact-main replay are ADR-local metadata, release-truth, and receipt surfaces only; no additional live automation surfaces changed after the verified `ansible-pull` plus host-control-loop proof above.
